forces.name: Lagos State Emergency Number
forces.division: Lagos State Emergency Management (767 — Lagos-specific free line)
forces.notes: 767 is Lagos State's dedicated emergency number — free 24/7 on all networks within Lagos. Covers police, fire, ambulance.

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Lagos State Control Room
forces.notes: Permanently assigned office lines — do not change with officer postings. High-risk/active zone

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Lagos State PRO
forces.source: police.gov.ng official NPF directory + NPF PRO contact list 2025

forces.name: Lagos Police — State CID Panti
forces.source: Punch Newspaper — official Lagos Police Command press release, June 2024
forces.notes: Dedicated office line — permanently assigned, does not change with officer redeployments.

forces.name: 81st Division Nigerian Army — Lagos
forces.notes: 81 Division covers Lagos and Ogun. HQ Ikeja Cantonment, Lagos. No public phone — contact via @HQNigerianArmy.

forces.name: NSCDC — National Hotline
forces.source: nscdc.gov.ng official website — 09029164164 is the published report line
forces.notes: NSCDC direct report line. 199 short code exists but may not connect reliably — use this 11-digit number instead.
